strengths: Proven data transformation and ETL pipeline delivery
Quantified impact in analytics and automation
weaknesses: Limited or no Microsoft Foundry/Copilot experience
No explicit RAG or prompt-engineering project evidence
Sparse agentic workflow / MCP / A2A exposure
Regulatory AI governance and SR 11-7/23-4 familiarity not shown
improvement_bullets: Architected and refined RAG pipelines using Python and Snowflake, implementing document chunking and metadata-driven retrieval to enhance the accuracy of automated business knowledge assistants.
Engineered and evaluated prompt engineering strategies for internal productivity copilots, utilizing iterative testing to mitigate hallucination risks and improve output groundedness.
Designed and documented agentic workflow prototypes in Python, incorporating tool-calling logic and human-in-the-loop controls to automate complex, multi-step regulatory reporting tasks.
Applied AI governance frameworks by preparing comprehensive model inventories, change-control artifacts, and audit-ready documentation to ensure compliance with privacy-by-design standards.
Performed rigorous evaluation of machine learning outputs for bias, fairness, and accuracy, establishing monitoring metrics for drift and reliability in production-grade environments.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Applied AI Analyst opportunity with Metropolitan Commercial Bank. I am interested in this opportunity because of the bank's commitment to responsible innovation and human-AI teaming. What interests me about working for Metropolitan Commercial Bank is its focus on digital onboarding and omnichannel banking, which inspires me because it demonstrates a clear vision for integrating high-tech solutions into a traditional, high-compliance environment. I believe my background in building automated data pipelines and my experience in rigorous model evaluation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex technical requirements into actionable, governance-compliant solutions. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for standardized KPIs and designed a unified data governance framework that replaced manual reporting, resulting in a 40% improvement in work efficiency and a 'single source of truth' for business stakeholders. Ultimately, I know that the Applied AI Analyst role at Metropolitan Commercial Bank would allow me to bring my expertise in data-driven automation to the development of AI-assisted loan documentation and productivity copilots. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my skills in cross-functional collaboration and robust database management. I collaborated with a 14-person product team to optimize relational database queries and integrate API datasets, which improved data accuracy by 60% and directly supported downstream analytics. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and SQL in working on RAG-based architectures and agentic workflows at Metropolitan Commercial Bank. I know that my technical adaptability and rigorous approach to documentation align with what it takes to succeed in the Applied AI Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
